sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32695" key="e)/kplwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔκπλωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n32695.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">navigable,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁλκάσι καὶ κώπῃ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Him.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:p.371B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.371B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
